<noinclude>

This is the "Review" form to create an edit pages at the Review namespace.
[[Category:Document states]]

</noinclude><includeonly>
{{{info|create title=Create a Review|edit title=Edit a <page name>}}}
<div id="wikiPreview" style="display: none; padding-bottom: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid #AAAAAA;"></div>
{{{for template|Review}}}
{| class="formtable"
! Reviewer: {{FieldTooltip|Reviewer}}
| {{{field|Reviewer|default=current user}}}
|-
! Review date: {{FieldTooltip|Review date}}
| {{{field|Review date|default=now}}}
|-
! Review state: {{FieldTooltip|Review state}}
| {{{field|Review state|input type=dropdown|mandatory|values=Reviewed,Incorrect|default=Reviewed}}}
|-
! Quality control tags: {{FieldTooltip|Quality control tag}}
| {{{field|Quality control tag|property=Quality control tag|input type=tokens|list}}}
|}
{{{end template}}}

{{{standard input|save|label=Save the Review}}} {{{standard input|cancel}}}
</includeonly>
